name: Avocados with Strawberry Salsa and Crispy Tortilla Strips
recipeIngredient: 1 fresh serrano or jalapeno chili (remove stems, seeds, and ribs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wear rubber gloves and remove stems, seeds, and ribs from the chili.
2. Chop the chili finely.
3. In a bowl, stir together the chili and remaining salsa ingredients.
4. Salsa may be made several hours ahead and chilled, covered in the refrigerator.
5. Stack tortillas and cut them in half. Cut stacks crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick strips.
6. Heat 1/2 inch of vegetable oil over moderate heat until hot but not smoking in a heavy skillet.
7. Working in two batches, fry tortilla strips for about 30 seconds or until crisp and golden.
8. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the fried tortilla strips to paper towels to drain excess oil.
9. Sprinkle fried tortilla strips with salt to taste.
10. Halve the avocado (remove pit) and slice each half into 6 wedges.
11. Slice chicken into 6 wedges.
12. Fan the avocado, chicken, and salsa onto 2 plates.
13. Spoon about 1/2 cup strawberry salsa over each fan.
14. Mound crispy tortilla strips alongside.
Yield: 2 servings
